backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point placeholder with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (role-based login landing page, per-role login pages, role-filtered dashboards) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing short descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing the purpose and key details of every component, context, and configuration file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and other UI variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'SmartCampus Connect' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component that manages three views (landing, login, dashboard) based on auth state, wraps the app in AuthProvider and ThemeProvider, and renders the appropriate role-specific dashboard with Navbar and footer after login.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar that displays only the tab matching the currently authenticated role, shows a role badge, and includes theme toggle and logout button.
frontend/src/components/RoleLoginPage.ts: Role-specific two-panel login page with a branded left panel and a right-side form featuring username/password fields, a quick-enter button, and mock authentication that calls onLogin after a short delay.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionLan: Renders a landing page where users select their role (Student, Teacher, Institute, or Parent), displaying styled role cards with icons, descriptions, and accent colors before routing to the appropriate portal.
frontend/src/components/tabs/AcademicRoa: Displays a semester-by-semester academic roadmap for selectable branches, showing subject progress, completion status, and faculty contact details for each semester.
frontend/src/components/tabs/AntiTrapFee: Provides a community-driven fraud/scam reporting feed for job and internship offers, allowing students to upvote reports, comment, and submit new reports with proof attachments.
frontend/src/components/tabs/Competitive: Shows a hub for students preparing for competitive exams (GATE, CAT, GRE, etc.), listing peer profiles with mock scores and streaks, existing study groups, and a form to create an exam profile.
frontend/src/components/tabs/faculty-hub: A faculty academic control panel that consolidates syllabus uploads, marks entry, quiz/task creation, exam scheduling, and student notifications into a single dashboard.
An AI teaching assistant panel for faculty that provides lecture summarization, auto-generated quiz questions, at-risk student identification, and performance predictions with trend indicators.
A read-only dashboard displaying curriculum coverage progress across branches and divisions, including a topic timeline, overdue topic alerts, and a weekly teaching activity heatmap.

A faculty performance leaderboard and networking panel that ranks faculty by overall score, supports department filtering, and shows individual metrics like teaching score, research count, and improvement suggestions.

Renders a grid of external tool integrations (Google Classroom, GitHub, LinkedIn, Smartboard, Report Generator) with connection status badges and action buttons. Handles simulated connect/sync/generate actions with local state updates.

Provides a smartboard teaching session UI where faculty can select branch, division, and subject, then start/stop a class with recording and auto-upload toggles. Displays a topic checklist with completion progress for the selected subject.

Displays a filterable table of student performance metrics (attendance, assignments, participation, achievements) with a mini SVG skill-growth sparkline per student and an attendance distribution bar chart.
frontend/src/components/tabs/FacultyInte: Acts as a tabbed shell for the Faculty Intelligence Hub, rendering sub-sections like Smartboard Teaching, Student Performance, AI Teaching Assistant, and others via a horizontal sub-navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/tabs/institute-c: A sticky bottom panel showing campus governance metrics (satisfaction, sustainability, alerts) with a circular smart-campus score meter and an SVG trend line chart, collapsible via a toggle bar.

Renders a filterable faculty performance table with teaching scores, research counts, and feedback ratings, flagging weak performers with training recommendations and confirmation dialogs for administrative actions.

Renders an institute command dashboard tab showing infrastructure gaps, lab comparisons, smartboard usage, tech upgrade statuses, modernization progress, and placement data including company engagement, salary trends, branch-wise placement stats, and recruiter feedback.

Displays institutional KPI cards, branch/division performance scores, teacher rankings, weak student analysis, attendance trends, benchmarking against IITs/NITs, and prioritized improvement recommendations.

Shows a student growth dashboard with weak student identification, improvement plans, skill gap analysis vs industry benchmarks, certifications earned, competitive exam stats, mentorship assignments, and placement readiness distribution.
frontend/src/components/tabs/InstituteCo: Top-level Institute Intelligence Command Center tab component with a header and sub-navigation that switches between four sub-sections: Performance Analytics, Faculty Optimization, Student Growth, and Infrastructure/Placement.
frontend/src/components/tabs/parent-insi: Provides parents a transparency view of faculty profiles including qualifications, engagement scores, syllabus completion, and student feedback ratings, along with a division-level class performance comparison.
Presents a parent-facing report on campus infrastructure upgrades, placement statistics with package trends, top-college benchmarking, campus quality metrics, and recent campus development updates.
A collapsible panel component for the Parent Insight Portal that allows parents to schedule meetings with teachers/HOD, select time slots, submit feedback, and rate their experience.
A detailed student report component displaying academic performance, subject grades, skills, achievements, career readiness, and a monthly performance mini line chart for a mock student profile.
frontend/src/components/tabs/ParentInsig: Parent Insight Portal tab component with a secure-portal header, print-report button, and sub-navigation routing between Student Growth, Faculty Transparency, and Institute Development sub-sections.
frontend/src/components/tabs/SkillBasedT: Displays a searchable, filterable directory of software and hardware students with skill tags, project counts, and social links, alongside a list of upcoming hackathon opportunities.
frontend/src/components/tabs/SmartNotifi: Student goals and notifications tab featuring live countdown timers for upcoming exams, an assignment checklist, earned/unearned achievement badges, and a user-created study goal tracker.
frontend/src/components/tabs/StudentDash: Top-level Student Dashboard shell component with a header and sub-navigation that routes between six sub-sections: Academic Roadmaps, Exam Hub, Smart Goals, Skill-Based Teams, Marketplace, and Anti-Trap Feedback.
frontend/src/components/tabs/Sustainable: A peer-to-peer marketplace component for students to buy, sell, or rent academic items like dev boards, books, and hardware. Supports category filtering and displays product cards with ratings, pricing, and seller info.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Defines an AuthContext and AuthProvider that manage the current user role (student, teacher, institute, or parent) with login/logout functions persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A placeholder module that exports nothing, indicating no backend queries are needed since all data in this prototype is static or mocked.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines an extensive set of CSS custom properties (design tokens) for multiple portal themes including student, parent, faculty, and institute palettes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens for multiple portal themes (faculty, institute, parent, student), custom border radii, box shadows, and includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the EduManage platform project state including version, architectural notes, existing features, and image requirements for a role-based login system with Student, Teacher, Institute, and Parent roles.
